series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains all records maintained with the "AMANDA" database system. This system is an electronic database containing electronic records pertaining to the operations of the Bureau of Building Code Compliance, which includes both plan review and field inspection staff; the Bureau of Operations and Maintenance, including the Bedding, Elevator, and Boiler sections; the Bureau of Wage & Hour Administration; the Manufactured Homes Program; the Board of Building Appeals; and the Backflow Advisory Board. Records within the database include information pertaining to applicants for and holders of various licenses, certificates, and permits issued by the Division of Industrial Compliance and its related administrative boards, billing and invoice information, as well as records of inspections and investigations.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced, then destroy., Electronic: Erase
